creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 214319
revised version 3 of patch, omitting the build fix

The build fix was committed already on head/ as r534788 and MFH'd to 2020Q2 as r534789. This patch omits that part. 

files/patch-data_kernels_CMakeLists.txt needs to remain after the 3.0.2 update!
